zh.lifeSummary: 當Wolstone Childe於1569年10月29日出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾法爾納姆 羅雅爾時，他的父親David Childe29歲，母親Letitia Randall28歲。他於1590年5月4日與Ellen Empson在英國巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特 聖 彼得結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1602年2月7日在英國米德萊可倫敦 比曉普斯蓋特享年32歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wolstone Childe于1569年10月29日出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾法爾納姆 羅雅爾时，他的父亲David Childe29岁，母亲Letitia Randall28岁。他于1590年5月4日与Ellen Empson在英国巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特 聖 彼得结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1602年2月7日在英国米德萊可倫敦 比曉普斯蓋特享年32岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Childe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Child
meanings: nickname from Middle English child ‘child, infant’ (Old English cild), in various possible applications. The word is found in Old English as a byname, and in Middle English as a widely used affectionate term of address. It was also used as a term of status for a young man of noble birth, although the exact meaning is not clear; in the 13th and 14th centuries it was a technical term used of a young noble awaiting elevation to the knighthood. In other cases it may have been applied as a byname to a youth considerably younger than his brothers or to one who was a minor on the death of his father.
in Kent, possibly a topographic name from Old English cielde ‘spring (water)’, a rare word derived from c(e)ald ‘cold’.

nameMeanings.name: Wolstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rolleston
meanings: 1  English: locative name, in the Midlands from Rolleston (Leics, Notts, Staffs) and perhaps Rowston (Lincs); in ER Yorks from Rolston (or Rowlston) in Mappleton (ER Yorks); and in SW England from Rollestone in Upton Pyne, or Rolstone Barton in Morchard Bishop (both in Devon), or Rollestone (Wilts), and perhaps Rowlestone (Herefs). It is possible that some of the following bearers belong with (2), particularly the Yorks examples.

2 English: relationship name variant of Rollinson , reduced to Rolleson and altered by the addition of an intrusive -t-, as though it were a locative name in -ston. Compare Thomas Rolleson’, 1377 in Poll Tax (Kingston upon Hull, ER Yorks), and Christopher Rollston, 1723, Henry Rowlstone, 1763 in IGI (Kingston upon Hull, ER Yorks).

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Wolstone Childe was born on 29 October 1569, in Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, David Childe, was 29 and his mother, Letitia Randall, was 28. He married Ellen Empson on 4 May 1590, in Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 7 February 1602, in London Bishopsgate, Middlesex, England, at the age of 32, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.London St Helen Bishopsgate, Middlesex,: London St Helen Bishopsgate, Middlesex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wolstone Childe est né le 29 octobre 1569, à Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, David Childe, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Letitia Randall, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Empson le 4 mai 1590, à Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 février 1602, à London Bishopsgate, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Wolstone Childeが1569年10月29日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアファルンハム ロイアルで生まれた時，父David Childeは29歳，母Letitia Randallは28歳であった。1590年5月4日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチャルフォント スト ペターでEllen Empsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1602年2月7日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン ビショプスガトで32歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Helen Bishopsgate, Middlesex,: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 헬 비숍스가트
ko.lifeSummary: Wolstone Childe(이)가 1569년 10월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 패른함 로야에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Childe(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Letitia Randall(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1590년 5월 4일 영국 벅잉함실르 차폰트 스트 피터에서 Ellen Empson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1602년 2월 7일 영국 미들레세스 런던 비숍스가트에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wolstone Childe nasceu em 29 de outubro de 1569, em Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, David Childe, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Letitia Randall, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Empson em 4 de maio de 1590, em Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1602, em London Bishopsgate, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Helen Bishopsgate, Middlesex,: лондон ст хелен бишопсгэит, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wolstone Childe родился 29 октября 1569 г. в местности фарнам рояль, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени David Childe было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Letitia Randall, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Empson 4 мая 1590 г. в местности халфонт ст питир, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 февраля 1602 г. в местности лондон бишопсгэит, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wolstone Childe nació el 29 de octubre de 1569, en Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, David Childe, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Letitia Randall, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Ellen Empson el 4 de mayo de 1590, en Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de febrero de 1602, en London Bishopsgate, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
